remainingEvidence: Implement authenticated Tenant-to-target Durable Object transport that establishes the permit issuer and source independently of caller-supplied permit fields
Add adversarial Cloudflare runtime evidence that substitution of every bound field is rejected before any EffectAttempt

Implement target-owned admission that exact-matches the persisted invocation, reservation epoch, local claim, package pin, target fence and domain, validity window, and authenticated issuer and source before nonce consumption
Add Cloudflare Durable Object SQLite restart, replay, rollback, expiry, stale-local-state, and post-issuance-watermark evidence for nonce consumption atomic with EffectAttempt admission

test/profiles/facets/web.test.ts#Web policy backend [P11-WEB-CREDENTIAL-POLICY] rejects caller credentials before transport
test/profiles/facets/web.test.ts#Web policy backend [P11-WEB-DISALLOWED] denies disallowed and credential-bearing requests before transport
test/profiles/facets/web.test.ts#Web protected facade [P11-WEB-FETCH] routes fetch and search through invoke
test/profiles/facets/web.test.ts#Web policy backend [P11-WEB-LIMIT-POLICY] enforces request and rate limits before transport
test/profiles/facets/web.test.ts#Web policy backend [P11-WEB-SEARCH] mediates search with externalSend impact before transport
test/profiles/facets/web.test.ts#Web policy backend [P11-WEB-URL-SAFETY] rejects unsafe and disallowed URLs before transport
